content.title: <TextStyle.Yellow>ADS Basic Summary</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.LightBlue>ADS currently hosts ALL 9 official & DLC maps via nitrado & powered by Beacon Sentinel & Helena Bot!</>

<TextStyle.Orange>- General Harvest Rates: 5x</>
<TextStyle.Orange>- Combined Taming Speed: 10x [Taming Speed 2x X 5x Wild Dino Hunger]</>
<TextStyle.Orange>- Custom Slash Commands & Unique scripts running in the background!</>
<TextStyle.Orange>- Admin Market & Events ran thru Community Discord!</>
<TextStyle.Orange>- Most Saddles & kit cheapened in crafting cost!</>
<TextStyle.Orange>- Buffed Ascension Bosses but no cap on Dino Levels!</>
<TextStyle.Orange>- Unique Event Mod active on each map separately!</>
<TextStyle.Orange>- Unique Perks & D20 games for Server Donators!</>
<TextStyle.Orange>- Starter Kits can be found at the ADS Public Teleporters at Obelisks!  Unique & exclusive admin market stalls can be found at Admin Community Centers on each map!</>
<TextStyle.Orange>- Cross-Cluster Chat & to Discord General Chat channel & back! (Helps with XBOX/Microsoft Gamestore users who have inherent issues with ingame chat censorship)</>

<TextStyle.LightBlue>Last updated May 2026</>

content.title: <TextStyle.Green>ADS Custom Slash Commands!</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.LightBlue>Through the Amazing Power of Beacon Sentinel comes Angel Devil Servers' Custom Slash Commands!  Send any of the following (without the " ") into global chat to receive your Angel Blessing or Devil Curse!</>

<TextStyle.Violet>"/kit" - Grants you a basic kit once per week across cluster!</>
<TextStyle.Violet>"/ads" - Blesses or Curses you with a random tame at a random level (could be great, could be meh!) in a vanilla cryopod in your pocket!  Can be claimed once PER MAP, PER WEEK! - meaning 9x free tames weekly if you transfer!</>
<TextStyle.Violet>"/tp2cc" - Grants you an Angel's Blessing and teleports you to the local CC on any map! - Requires 3 hours to cooldown</>
<TextStyle.Violet>"/fever" - The Devil Curses you with Swamp Fever! (Useful for those wishing to unlock the Ark steam/Console achievement for curing the fever and have an antidote ready)</>
<TextStyle.Violet>"/denethor" - A Lord of the Rings Reference... Find out for yourself!</>

<TextStyle.LightBlue>Last updated May 2026</>

content.title: <TextStyle.Violet>Custom! Custom! Custom!</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.Red>Make Angel Devil Servers YOUR Community Home!</>

Strive to Overcome the Devil's Gauntlet (Buffed Ascension Bosses) bringing in a mutated horde of Boss fighters!  Although ADS Cluster is quite boosted, players will die REGULARLY as, it being Player vs Environment, we have made said environment highly deadly to survivors via custom settings, buffs and nerfs!

But don't fret, survivor...

There are many custom settings & modded creatures specially chosen to aid you on your adventures and ascension beyond...  

Dare you meet the challenge?

content.title: <TextStyle.Orange>SETTINGS IN DEPTH</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.White>IN-DEPTH Settings may be found in the following link:</>
<TextStyle.Orange>https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1JvZZWkU3oDnfLB4KKY-3xiyMhdZQ8XDqigJS25n10dI/edit?gid=1292045507#gid=1292045507</> 
or by clicking the links icon to the bottom left!

content.title: <TextStyle.Violet>BASIC RULES</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.Yellow>[FULL Rules via Discord Rules Channel]</> 
- No offensive, racist, discriminatory or otherwise inflammatory tribe, character, or creature names, or chats.
- No griefing or stealing of any kind - including, but not limited to: insiding, egg/breeding line theft, drowning players, wild dino-kiting, structure blocking, taming/OSD/fight interference, etc.
- Always ensure to log off in a safe, enclosed area & that any valuable items or creatures are adequately stored as well.
- Admin requests for help must be reasonable (such as losing access to tribe, character corruption, etc) & done via discord ticket. Do not DM admins & read FAQs before creating ticket when possible. 
- Base rules: 1x Base per map, min. 90x foundations apart from other bases & max diameter of 45x foundations. Alternatively, 2x2 ocean plats, or 3x cliff/tree platforms in close proximity & in actual use.
- Keep rare resources publicly accessible/unlocked (explorer notes, black pearls, sap/oil/water/gas veins, etc).
- Clean logout FOBs, traps, OSD setups, etc. after use.
- No builds at or close to artifact caves, boss terminals, or unique dino/egg/resource spawn zones.
- Please build aesthetic bases! Box Bases are ugly!
- Max of 30x tames allowed out at any given time on each map per tribe & No AFK Breeding.

content.title: <TextStyle.Red>ADS Version 5.21 [01st June 2026]</>
content.text:
- <TextStyle.Red>HEAVILY REDUCED ***BurrowBuck*** Spawns across cluster</> as a means to combat overspawn and burrowbuck AI latency (reports sourced from Reddit) - <TextStyle.Yellow>For the Nerds: 1% weight limit with 1% total node limit</>
- Added a Sentinel Script to "watch" for certain behaviours and webhook to admin channel.
- Updated Sentinel script for Kits to provide a cleaner queue action (less likely to fail unless during a sentinel outage)
- Foundational code completed but not active for a **/joke, /meme & /tip** new slash commands coming to ADS soon:tm: 
- Design of script underway to create a profile of player activities that are <TextStyle.Yellow>player-accessible</> (for instance death count totals, favourite wild to kill based on counts, Progression/objective unlocks and dates, other history etc) 
- Updated WBUI2 Mod Json to include version 5.21 details in "Updates" Tab.
<TextStyle.LightBlue>- Prepared Temporary Event code for June 2nd (Digital coming tomorrow)</>
<TextStyle.LightBlue>- Designing June's D20 to be more Blessing-heavy to offset for last months very cursed rolls!</>

<TextStyle.Violet>EVENT SETTINGS ADDED ON 2ND JUNE -- SEE FIRST TAB FOR DETAILS</>

content.title: <TextStyle.Red>ADS Version 5.30 [07th May 2026]</>
content.text:
<TextStyle.Violet>## Heavy Optimisation and Code Sweep Update</>
The cluster's configuration has been rebuilt from the ground up to ensure no irregularities from engram or creature spawn arrays could be causing any unnecessary latency issues.  This involved several days of coding and fine-combing of v5.22 codeset.  Some changes with this update have also been implemented as so:
- Additional Munitions weapons and explosives now have increased default base damage across the board by about a third to double original values.
- Creature Spawn Array returned to original ADS configuration of only Legendary Spawns and known WC overspawns configured by replacement ini - this means that many dinos will spawn from the original level 5-150 range as opposed to recent usual of 50-150.  May return these settings later after latency considerations.
- Custom Craft for ADS' Artifact Blueprints fixed/tweaked (one artifact was uncraftable and a few have been tweaked for balance).
- Nameless Venom Drops increased in a bid to combat issue with nameless venom requirements.
- Reapers set to drop more pheromone and also allotments of Nameless Venom.
- Automated Dino Wipes Schedule REMOVED.  It will now only trigger on server restarts or if script commanded from discord.
- ASR Structure Decay Rebalanced.  Wood/Thatch/Stone now have "Stone" Decay timers. Greenhouse & Adobe now have Metal level Decay Timers.
- Shiny Dino Mod tweaked so upto 200 shinies could be on a server -- HOWEVER due to server restarts, dino wipes and general player activity; the total number will average between 100-150. 
- Stacks tweaked higher for a few stacks overrides that didnt follow convention.  Element shard and Red variety increased to 50k stacks for cloning QoL.
- Player Stat per level increased on Crafting skill by 50% (from default 1.0 -> 1.5 or 10%->15% per level).
- Vanilla Structure Decay slightly increased for better simplicity (See attached image).
- TEST Special Custom ini created for item trait blueprints - If it works as intended, players will be able to craft lesser traits from item trait blueprints into moderate traits (2x lesser = 1x moderate), and in turn, 3x moderate traits = 1x Greater Trait.  The custom crafting cost of the lesser traits are standardised and are excessive due to the nature of such things being more mid-end game content.
- Crafting Costs Array brought into base file as opposed to separately via map specific overlay-configs.
- Item Compressor Engram Disabled (From Admin Arsenal Mod) as its unnecessary with our settings.
- Vanilla With Sprinkles (VWS) Mod Pull range increased by around 33%.
- VWS Mod added new config: Stack weight-reduction multipier (50% less weight on stacked resources!).
- Added Limit to Alfa Oceanic platforms (4x) in range (25000). 
- Increased Plaform health to 200k and reduced damage received to near non-existent.
- Increased outer-support distance for ocean platforms (10x foundations --> 15x).
- Spawn Weight limit applied to Runic wyvern spawns (to make things slightly less deadly for new joiners & to make Runics a slightly rarer reward tame).
- Tamed Additional Earnable Levels increased from default 88 additional levels to a custom-scaled, 254 additional levels (so people can have that perfect 254-254-254 if they really wanna sweat it).  Some of your tamed dinos may receive a few levels due to changes in level experience requirements.
- Hexagon Cost Multiplier set to 0.5 (50% cheaper costs) & Reward Multiplier increased to 2.0 (Double Hexagon Rewards) in preparation for Genesis 1.
- Max Hexagons in player Wallet increased to 666,666,666,666 (For the obsessive completionist!).
- Idle Kick setting removed/disabled.
 - Structure Stasis implemented - will begin to trigger when at least 6 players are on a given map and increase on a scale up until fully stasis bound at 20 players active.
- Photo Mode range increased to 60k (from 30k).
- Dinos should now be uncryoable in bunkers.

content.title: <TextStyle.Green>ADS Version 5.31 [15TH JUNE 2026]</>
content.text:
⚙️ Changelog
RENAMED SERVERS to include a secondary digit in preparation for entering double-digit cluster on genesis 1 launch (Members should search #ADS and refavourite servers/unfavourite old name servers)
ADDED Moro's Nothosaurus Mod, Engram Array, Crafting Recipes & Spawn weight limit multipliers!
ADDED Breedable Rhyniognatha Mod and related ini!
ADDED back ADS Custom Spawn replacement table! (Higher minimum level spawns on select creatures on each map & added Ab varieties!)
ADDED v5.21 ADS' Custom Beaver (& dam) spawns to beaches on island & center! (#ADS1 & 3) & CUSTOMED den loot to be more starter player friendly!
REDUCED default Burrow Buck Spawn counts & chance, removing weight multiplier override! (more specific, optimised method)
REMOVED ant/dragonfly spawns from grasslands spawn points again for better latency & spawn balance!
REDUCED Acrocanthosaurus spawns by half default limits on most maps due to many reports of overspawns! INCREASED Minimum Level Spawns on Extinction!
ADS' Alpha Orgy Spawn REINSTATED in Open Desert spawn point, Scorched Earth (#ADS2)!
INCREASED odds of Rex, Megatherium, Therizino, Giga/Carcha and Alpha spawn chances selectively across cluster!
Marginally INCREASED odds of Runic Wyvern Spawns on Scorched Earth!
INCREASED ALL Vanilla Wyvern/Rockdrake Spawn group numbers to encourage higher amounts of eggs & Reinstated their levels to 150-225!
Adjusted Dino Depot Ini in an attempt to reduce latency/crash issues involved with the mod!
REMOVED Pride & Ark Birthday Event settings! (Back to our usual settings & grind!)
REVERTED 
PreventPlannedStructureDecayReset=False
 setting due to reports of abuses on othe allied clusters!
THANATOS & SCORPION KING LEVELS AND STRENGTHS BOOSTED - New terrors walk #ADS6's Astraeos!
REMOVED Structure limits and adjusted some generator settings in case these had an effect on dino depot, latency-wise!
Vanilla welcome message auto-remove counter increased to 5 seconds from 1 second..
Updated WBUI2 Mod with new Meme of the Day as ADS' usual!

content.title: <TextStyle.Red>ADS Version 5.20 [26/27-May-2026]</>
content.text:
- Enhanced basic Aberration loot drops as they were a bit lacking
- Shiny *Enraged* now drop 10x Shiny Essence and *Regular* shinies drop 2x when killed
- Some lag reductive measures taken on Ab to improve latency for console users
- Fixed a setting regarding taming (reverted to 1.7x taming speed multiplied by 5x dino hunger from intended 2x taming speed x5 hunger)
- WBUI2 Mod UI updated with this update log and new meme


<TextStyle.Yellow>FURTHER HOTFIXED ON 27TH MAY AS WRONG VERSION OF ESSENCE WAS IN DROP</>
